c.d: The ability to send messages to a very large number of contacts (e.g., millions daily) without performance issues
Capability to send individualized messages rather than bulk group messages, allowing personal customization
Availability on major platforms such as iOS, Android, Windows, and Mac
Ability to integrate with collaboration or business productivity software ecosystems
c.s: Slack, Microsoft Teams, Google Chat, Lark

c.d: Range of supported message content such as SMS, MMS, images, videos, GIFs, emojis, location sharing
Availability of tools for tracking delivery, engagement, and campaign performance metrics
Ease of use including intuitive design and accessibility features
